title: Sqlitelogictest crash in simple select query
poc: SELECT ALL * FROM tab0 cor0 WHERE - 62 NOT IN ( 9, - ( + + 67 ) ) AND - col0 * + 51 BETWEEN + 8 AND - - 95;
key_bug_features: SELECT ALL with invalid syntax in query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > 5 AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_table(id), description TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT ALL * FROM test_table WHERE -62 NOT IN (9, -(-67)) AND value BETWEEN 8 AND -95;
